name: Woodland Archer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>樹海の射手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウッドランド・アーチャー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by having 2 or more Normal Monsters in your Graveyard. You can Tribute this card to add 1 Gemini monster from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by having 2 or more Normal Monsters in your Graveyard. You can Tribute this card to add 1 Gemini monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by having 2 or more Normal Monsters in your Graveyard. You can Tribute this card to add 1 Gemini monster from your Deck to your hand.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
